titleEn: India's mango exports to the U.S. surpass 2025 volume
contentHtml: India's fresh mango exports to the U.S. are projected to increase by 30% year on year in 2026, despite higher air freight costs. According to figures cited in the report, exports had already exceeded the entire 2025 volume of 2,188 metric tons, valued at US$9.6 million, by the third week of June.…
